name: agent-ci
description: Add local GitHub Actions execution through Agent CI.

optionalSteps.name: github-actions-workflow
optionalSteps.when: The target repo has no .github/workflows/*.yml or .github/workflows/*.yaml files.
optionalSteps.prompt: This repo has no GitHub Actions workflow for Agent CI to run. Do you want me to add a minimal npm CI workflow as part of this upgrade?

docs: Document Docker prerequisites and the canonical local CI command.
Document AGENT_CI_DOCKER_HOST when a non-default Docker socket is needed.
Record any new target-project verification contract in the target repo's durable docs.
notes: Combine --quiet with --json so agents receive structured lifecycle progress without animated terminal output.
Give one deterministic npm install step a stable id and select it with --prewarm-through before parallel jobs start.
Use current Agent CI cache isolation instead of forcing --jobs 1 or adding repo-local install locks.
Keep the target repo's package manager and workflow names unless there is a documented reason to change them.
